description: Beyond the Veil Patch 5 (7 March 2023) — New Twitch Drops, Crystal League and Crystal Arena, Albion East Closed Beta, Changes and Improvements, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Crystal League and Crystal Arena

items.text: At the end of each round, all scoring Runestones reset; the team that holds most Runestones at the end of each round loses their Runestones
Map changed from Cross to Spade
At the end of each round, all scoring Runestones reset; the team that holds most Runestones at the end of each round loses their Runestones

sections.searchable_text: Crystal League and Crystal Arena At the end of each round, all scoring Runestones reset; the team that holds most Runestones at the end of each round loses their Runestones Scoring Round: 60s → 150s Scoring Changed 1 Runestone advantage 10 → 25 2 Runestones advantage 10 → 35 3 Runestones advantage 20 → 50 Runestone Channel Range: 4m → 8m Map changed from Cross to Spade At the end of each round, all scoring Runestones reset; the team that holds most Runestones at the end of each round loses their Runestones Scoring Round: 120s → 180s Scoring Changed 1 Runestone advantage 10 → 30 2 Runestones advantage 10 → 45 3 Runestones advantage 20 → 60 4 Runestones advantage 20 → 75 5 Runestones advantage 60 → 90 Runestone Channel Range: 4m → 8m

sections.heading: Albion East Closed Beta

items.text: Albion East downtime moved back one hour to 23:00 UTC
Faction Hearts and Faction Crests removed from Marketplace
Resource weight buff persists after knockdown
Fixed issue were Castle and Outpost Chests wouldn’t spawn on Thursdays
Added Carrot Soup and Mules to Royal City Marketplaces (except Caerleon)
Zones with 20:00 UTC prime time changed to 02:00 UTC

subitems.text: These zones now unlock at 08:00 UTC on reset days
Zones with 14:00 UTC prime time now unlock at 14:00 UTC on reset days
Note: changed times for reset days will not be implemented until after the Beta Season but are listed here for transparency

sections.searchable_text: Albion East Closed Beta Albion East downtime moved back one hour to 23:00 UTC Faction Hearts and Faction Crests removed from Marketplace Resource weight buff persists after knockdown Fixed issue were Castle and Outpost Chests wouldn’t spawn on Thursdays Added Carrot Soup and Mules to Royal City Marketplaces (except Caerleon) Carrot Soup price: 1250 → 750 Mule price: 20,000 → 5,000 Zones with 20:00 UTC prime time changed to 02:00 UTC These zones now unlock at 08:00 UTC on reset days Zones with 14:00 UTC prime time now unlock at 14:00 UTC on reset days

sections.heading: Changes and Improvements

subsections.heading: Faction Warfare:

items.text: Static Dungeons no longer advance the front line of Faction Warfare
Faction Points are now properly awarded when defeating another Faction Flagged player in Static Dungeons or Passages
The smuggling mission buff has been split into two distinct parts: invisibility (20s) and silence/attack prevention (30s)

subitems.text: This is to make it clearer when the invisibility ends, and that it does so before the rest of the buff

items.text: The Daily and Campaign Rewards will now unlock at 00:00 UTC on both Albion East and Albion West

subsections.searchable_text: Faction Warfare: Static Dungeons no longer advance the front line of Faction Warfare Faction Points are now properly awarded when defeating another Faction Flagged player in Static Dungeons or Passages The smuggling mission buff has been split into two distinct parts: invisibility (20s) and silence/attack prevention (30s) This is to make it clearer when the invisibility ends, and that it does so before the rest of the buff The Daily and Campaign Rewards will now unlock at 00:00 UTC on both Albion East and Albion West

subsections.heading: Adventurer's Challenge:

items.text: Adventurer's Challenges now always start at 00:00 UTC on the 1st of the month on both Albion East and Albion West
Daily and Weekly Rewards now unlock at 00:00 UTC on both Albion East and Albion West
Crystal Spider Might required per level doubled

subsections.searchable_text: Adventurer's Challenge: Adventurer's Challenges now always start at 00:00 UTC on the 1st of the month on both Albion East and Albion West Daily and Weekly Rewards now unlock at 00:00 UTC on both Albion East and Albion West Crystal Spider Might required per level doubled

subsections.heading: UI Improvements:

items.text: Sub-menus in Travel Planner UI now scrollable
Improved functioning of Sort and Quality Filter in Marketplace UI
Added info button to Appearance UI

subsections.searchable_text: UI Improvements: Sub-menus in Travel Planner UI now scrollable Improved functioning of Sort and Quality Filter in Marketplace UI Added info button to Appearance UI

subsections.heading: Other Changes:

items.text: Using Inner Shadow (Shadowcaller) on players without combat armor (e.g. naked or with gathering gear) behaves as it does against Cloth Armor
Time Freeze (Great Arcane) now makes mobs immune to being Time Frozen again for 5s

subsections.searchable_text: Other Changes: Improved matchmaking in duo Mists Using Inner Shadow (Shadowcaller) on players without combat armor (e.g. naked or with gathering gear) behaves as it does against Cloth Armor Time Freeze (Great Arcane) now makes mobs immune to being Time Frozen again for 5s

sections.searchable_text: Changes and Improvements Faction Warfare: Static Dungeons no longer advance the front line of Faction Warfare Faction Points are now properly awarded when defeating another Faction Flagged player in Static Dungeons or Passages The smuggling mission buff has been split into two distinct parts: invisibility (20s) and silence/attack prevention (30s) The Daily and Campaign Rewards will now unlock at 00:00 UTC on both Albion East and Albion West Adventurer's Challenge: Adventurer's Challenges now always start at 00:00 UTC on the 1st of the month on both Albion East and Albion West Daily and Weekly Rewards now unlock at 00:00 UTC on both Albion East and Albion West Crystal Spider Might required per level doubled UI Improvements: Sub-menus in Travel Planner UI now scrollable Improved functioning of Sort and Quality Filter in Marketplace UI Added info button to Appearance UI Other Changes: Improved matchmaking in duo Mists Using Inner Shadow (Shadowcaller) on players without combat armor (e.g. naked or with gathering gear) behaves as it does against Cloth Armor Time Freeze (Great Arcane) now makes mobs immune to being Time Frozen again for 5s

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Chain Missile (all Arcane Staffs) First Target Damage: 121 → 132 Projectile Bounce Damage: 60 → 25 Arcane Charge Damage: 61 → 55 Dark Sphere (Evensong) Debuff Duration: 7s → 5s

subsections.heading: Bows

subitems.text: While you hold enchanted arrows, attack speed is increased 50% and normal attack damage is increased 240%
Recast ability within 8s to sidestep into target direction and enchant 4 more arrows (cannot exceed 6 arrows)

subsections.searchable_text: Bows Enchanted Quiver (Regular Bow) Reworked the ability Lucent Hawk (Mistpiercer) Damage: 145 → 160

subsections.heading: Daggers

subitems.text: Hitting an enemy player reduces this ability’s cooldown by 25%

subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Shadow Edge (all Daggers) Cooldown: 15s → 20s Hitting an enemy player reduces this ability’s cooldown by 25%

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Searing Flame (all Fire Staffs) Searing Flame Projectile Damage: 94 → 99 Furious Flame Projectile Damage: 182 → 191

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Frost Lance (all Frost Staffs) Damage: 145 → 160 Hail (Great Frost Staff) Damage: 130 → 142

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Knockout (all Hammers) Sleep Duration vs Players: 4.36s → 5s Sleep Duration vs Mobs: 8.72s → 10s Hit delay: 0.4s → 0.25s Standtime: 1s → 0.5s

subsections.heading: Quarterstaffs

subitems.text: Whirl your staff, dealing 38 physical damage every 0.25s in a 5m radius while channeling up to 0.6s (can move while channeling)
Hitting at least one enemy reduces cooldown by 0.5s for 5s (stacks up to 3 times)
Swing your weapon up to 3 times in the target direction, dealing 80 physical damage each hit
Hitting an enemy with all three swings increases your Move Speed by 30% and Normal Attack Damage by 50% for 4s
Improved Hit Detection of the first two hits
Removed the Slow on knocked-back enemies

subsections.searchable_text: Quarterstaffs Added new Q-Ability: Whirling Strikes Whirl your staff, dealing 38 physical damage every 0.25s in a 5m radius while channeling up to 0.6s (can move while channeling) Hitting at least one enemy reduces cooldown by 0.5s for 5s (stacks up to 3 times) Cooldown 4s / Channel Duration 0.6s Added new W-Ability: Gale Dance Swing your weapon up to 3 times in the target direction, dealing 80 physical damage each hit Hitting an enemy with all three swings increases your Move Speed by 30% and Normal Attack Damage by 50% for 4s Cooldown: 12s / Channel Duration: 1s Concussive Combo (all Quarterstaffs) Improved Hit Detection of the first two hits Separator (all Quarterstaffs) Cast Range: 3m → 5m Root Duration: 1.6s → 2.5s Removed the Slow on knocked-back enemies Removed the Ability: Empowered Slam Removed the Ability: Heavy Cleave Adjusted Ability Unlock Order Always Unlocked Level 3: Stun Run Level 15: Forceful Swing Level 40: Cartwheel Level 70: Rising Blow Level 85: Separator

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Spinning Blades (Dual Swords) No longer knocks enemies airborne

subsections.heading: Helmets

subitems.text: Reworked into the new ability: Firebreath
Breathe fire in a 13m cone in front of you. Enemies hit catch fire and take 160 magical damage over 3s
(For reference, DoT Damage of the old Poison was 180)

subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Poison (Mage Cowl) Reworked into the new ability: Firebreath Immortal (Mistwalker Hood) Cooldown: 45s → 30s Spider's Thread (Duskweaver Helmet) Standtime: 0.1s → 0s Thread Projectile Range: 15m → 17m

subsections.heading: Visual Improvements
subsections.searchable_text: Visual Improvements Quarterstaffs Stun Run (all Quarterstaffs) Swords Interrupt (all Swords) Armors Speed Caster (Scholar Robe) Electric Field (Stalker Jacket) Shoes Energetic Sprint (all Cloth Sandals) Rotten Ground (Cultist Sandals) Mark of Sacrifice (Hellion Shoes) Rejuvenating Sprint (all Plate Boots)

sections.heading: Fixes

subitems.text: Energy Cloud (Tower Chariot) now uses AoE spell indicator, rather than single target indicator
Sandstorm (Bridgewatch Cape) is less likely to be triggered twice in a row by high attack speeds
Fixed issue where Lunging Stabs (Bloodletter) could trigger cooldown reduction twice
Fixed issue where item icons remained ‘stuck’ to screen when scrolling inventory
Fixed issue where party join requests could still be received even when disabled
Fixed issue where chat log in Report Player UI overlapped input field
Fixed item enchantments sometimes displaying incorrectly in Marketplace UI
Fixed issue where Power Core and Energy Vortex tooltips on the World Map incorrectly showed “00” remaining time
Fixed issue where laborer rewards would sometimes not be given when Rewards UI closed too quickly
Fixed issue where clicking between Building UIs would sometimes not update display correctly
Fixed various issues with Travel Planner in Brecilien

items.text: Fixed issue where accounts that had not finished the tutorial could not enter the game
[STEAM] In streamer mode, login credentials are now hidden on character creation screen
[CONTROLLER] Fixed issue where item slots in Furniture UI could not be navigated
Minor graphical, terrain, audio, UI, and localization fixes
